name: Selfreliance Federal Credit Union
description_short: Selfreliance Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates and access to 85,000+ fee-free ATMs nationwide.
description_long:
Selfreliance Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving members across multiple states, with branch locations in Connecticut (Wethersfield, New Britain) and Massachusetts (Westfield). As a member-owned financial institution, it operates under the credit union model where members are technically owners rather than customers of a commercial bank.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, share certificates (CDs), auto loans, mortgages, personal credit cards, and commercial truck loans. Rates advertised on their website include auto loans as low as 4.69% APR, mortgages starting at 5.25% APR (30-year fixed at 5.99%), credit cards at 9.90% APR, and savings products yielding up to 3.75% APY. They also provide digital banking services, wire transfers, Zelle money transfer capabilities, and mortgage refinancing with rate adjustment options.

A primary distinguishing feature is their ATM network access: members have access to over 85,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide, which the website claims exceeds the combined ATM networks of the top three U.S. banks. This provides significant convenience and cost savings compared to traditional banks with limited ATM footprints. The credit union also markets specific programs such as a 10% down mortgage option with no PMI for first-time homebuyers and competitive rate comparisons against national bank averages.

As a credit union, Selfreliance requires membership eligibility, though the website indicates they accept new immigrants with Ukrainian passports and offer account opening to this demographic. Members should verify they meet membership requirements before applying. The institution appears stable and established but operates with more limited branch presence than major national banks, which may impact convenience for some consumers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Access to 85,000+ fee-free ATMs nationwide, claimed to exceed top 3 U.S. banks combined
Competitive rates on auto loans (4.69% APR for 2024+), mortgages (5.25% APR), and credit cards (9.90% APR)
Certificate yields up to 3.75% APY with 5-month terms offering recent rate increases
10% down mortgage option with no PMI for first-time homebuyers with one-time free rate adjustment
Member-owned credit union structure with potential for better rates and terms than commercial banks
Full-service digital banking, wire transfers, and Zelle money transfer capabilities
Specific mortgage rate guarantees with step-by-step guidance from home lending advisors
cons: Limited branch presence (only 3 confirmed branches in Connecticut and Massachusetts) compared to national banks
Membership eligibility requirements may exclude some consumers from joining
Rates are variable and subject to change at any time; advertised rates require credit approval
No mention of online account opening for all customer types; may require in-person visits
Limited geographic accessibility for existing members without national branch network
best_for: Existing members in Connecticut and Massachusetts seeking competitive loan and savings rates
Auto loan and mortgage refinancing borrowers with strong credit profiles
Consumers prioritizing fee-free ATM access and digital banking convenience
First-time homebuyers eligible for 10% down mortgages without PMI
diagnosis: Selfreliance Federal Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members in Connecticut and Massachusetts seeking competitive consumer lending rates, particularly for auto loans and mortgages, combined with broad ATM access nationwide. The main caveat is that membership eligibility and limited branch presence restrict accessibility compared to national banks, and rates shown are promotional figures requiring credit approval.
services: Mortgage lending (5.25% APR and up) with refinancing options
Commercial truck loans (7.74% APR and up)
Mortgage refinancing with rate adjustment options
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
